description.value:
• Action Cost: 2 [Combat] actions
  • Range: 60 feet
  • Effect: Target one creature you can see. Make opposed check: your Wisdom + Positive Mastery vs their Wisdom + Luck ([[/save type=will]]). If you win by 1+ net successes, they are Stunned until end of their next turn as Athore's judgment weighs upon them.
  • Usage: Uses 1 Channel Divinity

system.effect: Target one creature you can see. Make opposed check: your Wisdom + Positive Mastery vs their Wisdom + Luck (Will save). If you win by 1+ net successes, they are Stunned until end of their next turn as Athore's judgment weighs upon them.
